---
title: "Contact and Contributions"
description: "Contact ISA RC42 Social Psychology, share community contributions, or update member information."
toc: false
title-block-style: none
---

::: {.contact-hub}

::: {.contact-hero}
::: {.contact-layout}
::: {.contact-main-card}
## General Inquiries {#general-inquiries}

For general questions about RC42 Social Psychology, the website, newsletters, or community resources, please contact us at:

**Email:** [isa-rc42@isa-sociology.org](mailto:isa-rc42@isa-sociology.org)

| Role | Name | Contact |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **President** | Juan Carlos Castillo | Via RC42 email |
| **Secretary / Treasurer** | Lisa Slattery Walker | Via RC42 email |

::: {.contact-note}
For official ISA matters, including membership, fees, and general ISA information, please contact the ISA Secretariat directly through the [ISA website](https://www.isa-sociology.org/).
:::
:::

::: {.contact-side-stack}

::: {.contact-card #community-contributions}
## Community Contributions

Members and colleagues are invited to share calls for papers, events, publications, resources, opportunities, and announcements relevant to sociological social psychology.

All submissions are reviewed by the RC42 editorial team before publication.

[Submit a Community Contribution](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfjuQ7PX9qcXLSunPtl84DkhFYhLU_v1LbkepsVkvw7SAdNmA/viewform?pli=1&pli=1){.btn-rc42-primary .btn-sm target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::

::: {.contact-card #member-profile-updates}
## Member Profile Updates

If you need to update your member profile, affiliation, country, research interests, or public directory information, please contact the RC42 team at [isa-rc42@isa-sociology.org](mailto:isa-rc42@isa-sociology.org).
:::

:::
:::

::: {.contact-card .contact-portal-note}
## About This Portal

This website is maintained as a complementary digital portal for RC42 Social Psychology. It is not an official ISA platform. For technical issues with this website, please contact the [Online Communication Manager](../people/index.qmd) or the RC42 board via email.
:::

:::
